PETITION - AMENDED FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (H&S 11469 ET SEQ.) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,080.00 BE RELEASED TO JULIA VERDUZCO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT LEOPOLDO ZEPEDA. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $440.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JULIA VERDUZCO. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
